panel.bannerDesc: Tweak options below. Preview updates in real-time on the left.
panel.progressDesc: Character set used to render the generation progress indicator.
panel.barColorDesc: How the progress bar responds to usage level.
panel.paletteDesc: Full theme: model name, progress bar, git statuses.
panel.layoutDesc: Single-line compact or classic double-line layout.
panel.modelFormatDesc: How the AI model name appears in the statusline.
panel.dirPrefixDesc: Icon prepended to the working directory path.
panel.tokenFormatDesc: Display style for input/output token counts.
panel.gitPrefixDesc: Symbol placed before the branch name.
panel.gitModeDesc: Level of detail for file change counts.
panel.tipSecurityDesc: The generated script is localized. No data leaves your machine. It only modifies ~/.claude/settings.json.
panel.tipCompatDesc: Designed for ZSH and Bash environments. Works best with modern terminals featuring Nerd Fonts support.

left.guide1: Paste and run in terminal. You will see
left.guide2: indicating a successful installation. Restart Claude Code to apply.
